converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Nelva Weber papers
Weber, Nelva M.
4840
8.6 cubic feet.
1933-1986. Correspondence, drawings, published articles, manuscripts, biographical material, photoprints and negatives, and sketches. Correspondence, drawings, published articles, manuscripts of books and articles, biographical material, photoprints and negatives, and sketches; drawings, plans and sketches pertain to various work executed by Weber, particularly for Arrowsmith. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 25 ======= 25 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2267881
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
September 1993
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, April 2004Sharon Jank, 2006
Last modified:
Fredrika Loew, January 2019
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Landscape architect.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence; drawings and sketches; published articles and manuscripts of books and articles; biographical material; certificates and diplomas; and photographs, slides, and negatives. Drawings, plans and sketches pertain to various work executed by Weber, particularly for Arrowsmith. Slides include pictures of plants and gardens, travel views, including slides of a trip to the Galapagos, and family images. Also 3x5 cards describing varieties of plants. Illustrations to Weber's lectures on geomorphology.
Cite As:
Nelva Weber papers, #4840. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Color slides. Photographs. Galapagos Islands -- Pictorial works. Geomorphology. Women landscape architects. Landscape architecture.

Scope and Contents
Includes: Arrowsmith, Bane, Becker, Chamberlin, Cornell, Gwinner (Gewinner), Hatmaker, Meyer, Weber families. One letter dated 1868. Research is from about 1946-1959.Sammataro-Weber miscellany1932-198634NotesMar. 1974-Apr. 197835NotesJan. 1979-Nov. 198036Christmas letters1974-198337Thesis: Prairie-Forest Borders and Their Application in Landscape Architecture193538McLean County, Illinois39Walnut Grove Farm and Arrowsmith1941-1946310-12Walnut Grove Farm mss.313-18Property owned by Joseph M.
